final:
// // This module is designed to hold a 32-bit value. On the negative edge of the clock, if the reset signal is active, the output is set to zero. If the reset is inactive and the write enable (we4) signal is active, the output is updated with the inverted input data (not d).
module top_module(
	input wire clk,reset, we4,bt,
	input wire [31:0]d,
	output reg [31:0]q
);always@(posedge clk) begin 
		if(reset) begin
			q<=32'd0;
		end else begin 
			if(we4) begin
				q<=d;				
			end 
		end
	end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to hold a 32-bit value. On the negative edge of the clock, if the reset signal is active, the output is set to zero. If the reset is inactive and the write enable (we4) signal is active, the output is updated with the inverted input data (not d).
